title: Episode 1
overview: The Seigi, Akuma and Perfect Chojin factions form a non-aggression pact. Later, a hostile group gatecrashes a Seigi Chojin fan appreciation event.

title: Episode 2
overview: Terryman declares that he will represent the Seigi Chojin and battle the Perfect Large Numbers Corps. His first opponent is the merciless Max Radial.

title: Episode 3
overview: As the wounded Terryman struggles against Max Radial and his troublesome tires, he notices something that can help him turn the fight around.

title: Episode 4
overview: Five Akuma Chojin appear and battle the Perfect Large Numbers in the rings around the world. Turbomen contends with Stecasse-King's powers of mimicry.

title: Episode 5
overview: Just as Stecasse-King seems poised for victory, Turbomen turns the tables with a cunning trap. Mr. Khamen tenaciously tussles with Crushman in Berlin.

title: Episode 6
overview: Black Hole uses shadowy techniques to move around the wrestling ring and strike at Darmeshiman, who fights back with his ferocious canine skills.

title: Episode 7
overview: The Akuma Chojin reveal their true intentions. In the wrestling ring floating on the River Thames in London, Atlantis fights the fishlike Marlinman.

title: Episode 8
overview: As the crowd silently looks on at Atlantis impaled on Marlinman's bill, a lone cheer of encouragement spurs Atlantis into pulling off a miracle.

title: Episode 9
overview: As the fast-learning Peek a Boo continues using Kinnikuman's powerful skills against him, Kinnikuman decides to rely on basic fighting techniques.

title: Episode 10
overview: While watching The Mountain struggle against Strong the Budo, Buffaloman recalls meeting with his fellow Akuma Chojin before the matches began.

title: Episode 11
overview: Led by an unfamiliar Kinniku Clan member, the second group of Perfect Large Numbers arrives to face Kinnikuman and his friends in the next stage.

title: Episode 12
overview: The wrestlers hurry to the step pyramid rings, where seven members from the Seigi and Akuma Chojin factions team up to face the Perfect Large Numbers.

title: Episode 13
overview: Brocken Jr. finds himself at a disadvantage in his match against Crushman. Just when things seem hopeless, Ramenman shouts words of encouragement.

title: Episode 14
overview: As Marvelous seems confidently poised to strike a killing blow, a repentant Ramenman explains to him the virtue of sparing an opponent's life.

title: Episode 15
overview: Unable to use his shadowy skills due to Jack Chi's watery blasts, Black Hole finds himself on the verge of defeat — until he hears a familiar voice.

title: Episode 16
overview: After the Chojin Chairman approves a sudden change of format, Springman and Buffaloman take on Turbomen and Grim Reaper in a tag-team match.

title: Episode 17
overview: Turbomen activates a scorching skill to escape from Springman's coils. Although weakened, Springman uses Buffaloman to launch a last-ditch attack.

title: Episode 18
overview: Buffaloman faces a difficult choice. Despite Robin Mask’s impressive performance in the ring, Nemesis arrogantly dismisses him as an inferior Chojin.

title: Episode 19
overview: Withstanding Nemesis' devastating attacks, Robin Mask reveals how his past losses to Kinnikuman affected his sense of pride as a Seigi Chojin.

title: Episode 20
overview: The intense match between Robin Mask and Nemesis comes to a shocking conclusion. Warsman and Polarman's battle heats up in the pyramid's top ring.

title: Episode 21
overview: As Warsman struggles to find an effective strategy against Polarman's incredible strength, he starts to recall his distant childhood memories.

title: Episode 22
overview: Empowered by the cheers of his friends, Warsman begins countering Polarman but must finish the fight before his body reaches its limits.
